'''Peter M. Schweighofer''' is a writer, game designer, and editor of [[roleplaying game]] materials and fiction. He has worked for several game companies, including [[West End Games]], [[Wikipedia:Last Unicorn Games|Last Unicorn Games]], [[Wikipedia:Pinnacle Entertainment Group|Pinnacle Entertainment Group]], and [[Wizards of the Coast]].

In [[1993]], Schweighofer's professional association with ''[[Star Wars]]'' began when he joined West End Games. In his time at West End Games, Schweighofer established and edited the ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]'' and wrote for a number of sourcebooks and game supplements for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''. He also contributed to a number of other ''Star Wars'' publications, including some for Wizards of the Coast's new ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'', and is currently a freelance writer and editor living in [[Wikipedia:Brandy Station, Virginia|Brandy Station]], [[Wikipedia:Virginia|Virginia]].
